harness.name: stwo-perf
harness.anchor_note: Set both fields in one human-reviewed commit when the conformance goal's baseline-freeze phase produces the frozen pre-optimization baseline. Null anchor means drift budgets cannot be evaluated and judged promotion is disabled.

workload_registry.note: Command templates are data so flag drift is a manifest edit, not a code change. The runner prepends the built bench binary; {warmups}/{samples} come from gates policy; report schema is the checked-in native_proof schema v4.

holdout_generator.note: Judged runs draw one extra hold-out per class by jittering log_n_rows/sequence_len within class bounds; seed is recorded in the ledger row. Results publish as pass/fail only.

gates_policy.neutral_band_note: Promotion requires the declared-objective CI entirely below 1 - theta, where theta = max(theta_floor, dispersion_multiplier x per-class A/A dispersion recorded in the ledger epoch).

scopes.s1: kernel/function microbench (counters primary; wall time secondary)
scopes.s2: stage subtree via stage profiles (diagnostic only)
scopes.s3: complete proof transaction; acceptance floor for every submission
scopes.s4: process lifecycle: cold vs warm, sessions, pools, caches
scopes.s5: sustained queue (gates not yet green; s4 substitutes until then)
